description: A premium trading journal web application designed for daytraders, featuring advanced analytics and performance tracking.
target_audience: Daytraders seeking a sophisticated platform to track, analyze, and improve their trading strategies.
original_prompt: Premium Trading Journal fuer Daytrader. Dark theme, Electric Blue + Magenta. Inspiriert von Tradezella + Linear.app. Features: P&L per Strategy, Win-Rate per Setup, Backtesting, Equity Curve. Pricing: Free, Pro 39/mo, Elite 89/mo.
